message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker with completed cache, btree, MVCC, and FUSE tasks

Update the beads issue tracker JSONL with entries reflecting the work
completed in this batch:
- Cache eviction self-healing (dirty block skip instead of panic)
- B-tree split write ordering and deferred child freeing
- MVCC preflight/apply commit split for journaled atomicity
- JBD2 revoke block r_count parsing
- ext4 dx_hash multi-chunk and TEA transform corrections
- CLI seek-based metadata reading
- FUSE backpressure throttle tier and queue tuning
- Write-path E2E test coverage for ext4 and btrfs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
